blocks.speaker: Jonathan
blocks.content: That's what I'm talking about. Thursday. Don't be late.

blocks.speaker: Jonathan
blocks.content: Bruh 'I'll think about it' is not an answer. Thursday. Final answer.

blocks.speaker: Jonathan
blocks.content: You not a football player yet. That's literally what tryouts are for dawg.

blocks.speaker: Jonathan
blocks.content: Bruh if you go quiet on me right now I'm showing up to your house Thursday morning. Ya dig?

blocks.speaker: Jonathan
blocks.content: Mr. Cole will let me in. He likes me.

blocks.speaker: Jonathan
blocks.content: He tolerates me with warmth. That's basically the same thing.

blocks.speaker: Jonathan
blocks.content: Coach Briggs? Man. He's different. He don't hype you up, he don't tear you down — he just watches. And then tells you exactly what you are. No sugar. No cap.

blocks.speaker: Jonathan
blocks.content: Straight up it kind of is. But it's also — I don't know. Real. You'll see.
